notes: Titin (~109 kb mRNA) — most length-sensitive transcript in the genome; near-undetectable in moderate-to-severe FFPE
Nebulin — second-longest skeletal muscle mRNA; dropout marker
CA-125 / Mucin 16 — very long ovarian / pancreatic marker
Estrogen receptor — long 3'UTR, well-documented FFPE dropout in BRCA QC
Progesterone receptor — paired with ESR1 in BRCA FFPE QC; drops disproportionately
PTEN — long 3'UTR, FFPE-sensitive in CRC/PRAD QC
Beta-actin — short, abundant, classic FFPE-stable reference
B2M — short, abundant, near-universal reference (kept also for MHC-I context downstream)
